untranslatable_reason: The signal requires pattern recognition for identifying two distinct bottoms with 2-7 week separation and price variation measurement (0%-6% between bottom lows), which cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicators and basic operators. Detection of multiple bottoms, their temporal separation, and relative price comparison requires historical pattern matching or lookback functions not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: This Double Bottom pattern is fundamentally a multi-bar structural pattern that requires: (1) identification of two local minima within a 2-7 week window, (2) calculation of percentage variation between those two lows, and (3) confirmation breakout above the highest high between them. Standard OHLCV indicators cannot capture this multi-point pattern geometry. A complete implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside this rule engine's scope.
